title: more ships
description: ads ships that are on the water
body:
This mod ads rafts, small ships and big ships which have cold variants warm variants and lukewarm variants. And these variants have variants that their sail is open rolled or not there. And all these ships can also spawn with or vindicators or pillagers or wandering traders or villagers or no entities.

I have a discord server where you can ask questions, talk or put bug reports if you want to do it there https://discord.gg/bBj5vKGFMw.
This mod has been made with Mcreator.
